definition.schema:
schema  { query: Query mutation: Mutation }

type Game { awayScore: Int!
  awayTeam: Team!
  homeScore: Int!
  homeTeam: Team!
  id: ID!
  playedAt: String!
  source: String!
}

type Mutation { recordMyTeamGame(teamId: ID! @preset(value: "x-hasura-team-id"), opponentId: ID!, teamScore: Int!, opponentScore: Int!, isHome: Boolean!): Game!
  reportGame(homeTeamId: ID! @preset(value: "x-hasura-team-id"), awayTeamId: ID!, homeScore: Int!, awayScore: Int!, source: String! @preset(value: "user-reported")): Game!
}

type Query { game(id: ID!): Game
  games: [Game!]!
  leaderboard: [Team!]!
  myTeam(teamId: ID! @preset(value: "x-hasura-team-id")): Team
  team(id: ID!): Team
  teamByDepartment(departmentId: ID!): Team
  teamGames(teamId: ID! @preset(value: "x-hasura-team-id")): [Game!]!
  teams: [Team!]!
}

type Team { departmentId: ID!
  departmentName: String!
  draws: Int!
  gamesPlayed: Int!
  goalDifference: Int!
  goalsAgainst: Int!
  goalsFor: Int!
  id: ID!
  losses: Int!
  name: String!
  points: Int!
  wins: Int!
}
